center.name: 朱尔·韦罗
center.summary: 朱尔·韦罗是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Blue quail、Beaudouin's snake eagle、栗背翡翠等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = VU | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Circaetus beaudouini | authority = Verreaux & Des Murs, 1862 }} Beaudouin's snake eagle (Circaetus beaudouini) is a species of snake eagle in the family Accipitridae found in the Sahel region of west Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blue quail or African blue quail (Synoicus adansonii) is a species of bird in the family Phasianidae found in sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-vented barbet (Psilopogon lagrandieri) is an Asian barbet native to Laos, Vietnam and Cambodia, where it inhabits subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chocolate-backed kingfisher (Halcyon badia) is a species of kingfisher in the subfamily Halcyoninae, native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-headed waxbill (Estrilda atricapilla) is a common species of estrildid finch found in central Africa
